title: Fix green tile flash from grass fill conflict

log.context: Fix green tile flash from grass fill conflict

Done. Removed the `grassColor` fill lines (the comment, `ctx.fillStyle = grassColor(tx, ty)`, and `ctx.fillRect(x, y, TILE, TILE)`) from `drawForegroundTiles()` in `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`. The tree/rock shapes are now redrawn directly without first painting a green square underneath. Committed as `e53789e` and pushed.
